QID42_4: Description_4 - Welcome to this questionnaire.     It is part of a research study about socioeconomic status, conducted by Coralie Chevallier at Ecole Normale Superieure (Paris). The completed work will be confidential.     Participation in this study is voluntary. You may withdraw at any time, but you will only be compensated for the questions you answer, in accordance with the policies and the terms of Prolific. This study will last approximately 3 minutes.          To get further instructions about the study, please click on the 'Read and approved' box below.     By clicking on this box, you certify that you have agreed to participate in accordance with the above conditions. You also indicate that you have read this statement and are over the age of 18. - Read and approved

QID126: Ladder - Think of this scale as representing where people stand in the United Kingdom.   At the top of the scale (10) are the people who are the best off in terms of overall income. At the bottom (1) are the people who are the worst off in terms of overall income.  Where would you place yourself on this scale?    Please click on the number that corresponds to what you think your position is in the British society.
